title: IcarusWings
description: Easy to Craft wings, but if you fly too close to the sun... well you know how the story ends
body:
# 🪶 Icarus Wings
**Fly too close to the sun. You know how this ends.**

Icarus Wings adds a craftable pair of wax-and-feather wings that let you glide and flap through the skies — but at a cost. The higher you fly, the closer you get to disaster.

---
![flight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3c652e9f3bd7079299a8d487aa6cb282f8b627b_0.webp)
---

## ✨ Features
- **Glide** through the air like an elytra
- **Flap** by pressing jump mid-air for an upward boost
- Wings have a **flap cooldown** shown by a small bar above your hotbar
- Wings **melt and break** under dangerous conditions
- Find them in **dungeon and stronghold chests** — or craft them yourself

---

## ☀️ Hazards

| Condition | Effect |
|-----------|--------|
| Flying above Y=150 (daytime) | Wings slowly melt |
| The Nether | Wings melt quickly from the heat |
| Desert biome (daytime) | Wings degrade in the sun |
| Rain | Wings are damaged by moisture |
| Water | Wings shatter almost instantly |
| Fire | Wings burn away |

---

## 🪶 Crafting
Combine **feathers**, **honeycomb**, and a **stick** in a shaped recipe — or risk finding a pair in a dungeon or stronghold chest.
![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46f2dbf06af1f23d077f066b73a0c90c6c75a5d7.png)

---

## Safe Zones
The **End** is the one place your wings are truly safe — far from the sun, the wax holds.

---

## Advancements
- Let your wings melt by flying too high during the day and find out what it could be

---

## 📋 Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.9 <= 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

---

*The wings of Icarus were never meant to last. Neither are yours.*
